name: Marisa Kirisame
_design_notes: Based on Marisa's TH7 (Perfect Cherry Blossom) Stage 4 boss fight.
NS1 -> Comet/Blazing Star -> NS2 -> Non-Directional Laser -> NS3 -> Master Spark -> Final: Love & Magic Dual Spark
LASER_ROTATING: fires 'arms' lasers evenly spread in all directions, rotating each cycle.
Used for Non-Directional Laser: 8 beams spinning slowly.
LASER: fires one beam aimed at the player's current position.
Used for Master Spark: wide beam, long warning (aims first then fires).
GOLD = Marisa's gold star bullets   SPARK = bright spark for beam cores

reimu.speaker: BOSS
reimu.text: Yo, Reimu! Late as usual. I already 'borrowed' all the good loot from this place!

reimu.speaker: PLAYER
reimu.text: Marisa... Give it back before the owner files a complaint that I'll have to deal with.

reimu.speaker: BOSS
reimu.text: No way, finders keepers, ze! Besides, I need a tough test dummy for my new star magic.

reimu.speaker: PLAYER
reimu.text: I really don't have time for your games today. Get out of my way or get exterminated.

reimu.speaker: BOSS
reimu.text: That's the spirit! Let's see if your dodging is as sharp as your tongue! Here I come!

marisa.speaker: BOSS
marisa.text: Hey, wait a second! You're wearing my clothes! And my hat! What gives, ze?!

marisa.speaker: PLAYER
marisa.text: I could say the exact same thing to you, faker! Is this some kind of tanuki trick?

marisa.speaker: BOSS
marisa.text: A fake?! I'm the one and only ordinary magician! I'll prove it with my firepower!

marisa.speaker: PLAYER
marisa.text: Bring it on! I'll blast you so hard you'll forget my name! I mean, your name!

marisa.speaker: BOSS
marisa.text: Whoever survives gets exclusive rights to the Master Spark! Let's go!

sakuya.speaker: BOSS
sakuya.text: Oh hey, Sakuya! Perfect timing. Tell Patchy I'll return those books... eventually.

sakuya.speaker: PLAYER
sakuya.text: Lady Patchouli specifically sent me to retrieve them today, Marisa. With force, if necessary.

sakuya.speaker: BOSS
sakuya.text: Force? Sounds like fun! But you'll have to catch me first!

sakuya.speaker: PLAYER
sakuya.text: Time is literally on my side. I will clean up this mess and take back the Mansion's property.

sanae.speaker: BOSS
sanae.text: Well, well, if it isn't the Moriya Shrine's poster girl. Out collecting faith today?

sanae.speaker: PLAYER
sanae.text: Exactly! And defeating a notorious thief like you will surely boost our shrine's reputation!

sanae.speaker: BOSS
sanae.text: Notorious thief? I'm just an ordinary magician! You can't beat me with miracles alone, ze.

sanae.speaker: PLAYER
sanae.text: Common sense doesn't apply in Gensokyo! Prepare to face the power of a living god!

sanae.speaker: BOSS
sanae.text: Ha! I don't need gods, just my Mini-Hakkero! Eat my stardust!

phases._note: NonSpell 1 - Intro barrage. 5-way aimed gold fans + slow ORB ring.
Spell 1 - 'Star Sign: Comet - Blazing Star' (PCB Stage 4). CIRCLE movement = Marisa orbiting. Dense gold ring bursts + small aimed clusters.
NonSpell 2 - Escalation. Faster 5-way GOLD + RICE spiral.

Spell 2 - 'Love Sign: Non-Directional Laser'. 8 bidirectional beams (halfWidth 7) rotating ~26 deg/cycle. Normal gap between adjacent beams ~38 deg - tight but threadable. Aimed curtain + spiral fill safe angles. Lunatic: 16 arms, gap ~22 deg, warnTicks=7.
NonSpell 3 - Pre-final surge. Fast 6-way GOLD + dense RICE ring + spiral.

Spell 3 - 'Magic Sign: Master Spark'. STATIC boss. halfWidth 75 = 31% of arena per side; safe zones are narrow outer strips. Ambient attacks fire BEFORE the laser entry in the rotation so slow rings/aimed are already filling the screen when the warning appears. Timeline per cycle on Normal (~10 s): 5 quick ambient attacks (t=0-47), LASER warns (t=47-91), LASER fires (t=91-159), 4 post-laser attacks (t=157-198), repeat. Lunatic: warn only 22 ticks, cycle ~5 s.
Final Spell - 'Love & Magic: Dual Spark' (PCB last word). Two SPREAD SPARK columns erupt simultaneously + rings of GOLD curtain. She orbits fast.
